REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1955-1959 Page Street, San Francisco, Ca 94117)
Off Calendar Feb-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng appeared by zoom for and with Erin Markey (personal representative).

The sale was confirmed at $2,675,000.00 to Scott Morgan of Vanguard Properties on behalf of his client based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. Mr. Morgan confirmed that he understands that the commissions amount is to be split 50/50 and that he will send a text confirmation of his offer to the broker. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission subject to receipt of a revised order. An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-02-2020 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Cramer, Esq., counsel for Jasmyn Tarrant and Jimmie Miller, Jr., Petitioners (appearing by video conference); Lillian Ng, Esq., counsel for and with Erin Markey, Petitioner (appearing separately by video conference).

The Court generally notes the status of the estate proceedings, that the parties have consented to the appoint of Ms. Markey as an independent administrator, and that the competing petitions of Jasmyn Tarrant/Jimmie Miller, Jr. and Tauna Miller/Erica Miller will be taken off calendar. Counsel present agree. The Court tentatively grants the same, taking the matter under submission. Pending review, the Court sets status for close of the estate for April 18, 2022.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-14-2020 Continued To Oct-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Cramer appeared by zoom for and with Jasmyn Tarrant by zoom and specially appearing for Attorney Vincent Yu.
Tauna Miller also on zoom.

Mr. Cramer stated that they have an agreement, that they agreed to have Erin Markey act as the Professional Administrator, that they will be presenting a joint request to have Ms. Markey appointed and that he believes Lillian Ng is going to be Ms. Markey's Attorney. The Petition for Letters of Administration (2) are continued to October 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2020 Continued To Oct-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Continued To Sep-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Continued To Sep-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Vincent K. Yu appearing by Zoom for Tauna Miller (also appearing) and Erica Miller. Michael Cramer appearing in person for Jasmyn Tarrant and Jimmie Miller Jr. (both parties also appeared in person).

Mr. Yu stated that the parties had a friendly and frank exchange and that each set of respective clients wishes to go forward with their appointments. The Court noted that this is a difficult task and that the safest move would be for a neutral to be appointed. Mr. Yu addressed the allegations regarding Tauna Miller stating that Tauna Miller did not lose her children, that she was not convicted, and that she was appointed as the Conservator of her Father. In addition, Mr. Yu addressed familial closeness, stated that there are photos, and that there is a 30-year age gap between Tauna and Jimmie. Mr. Cramer stated that counsel had time to file verified paperwork, that Tauna was a Co-Conservator of the Person, that he is interested in speaking with Mr. Yu, and that there might be an option of one person from each side serving as Co-Administrators. Mr. Yu stated that he is not completely against that option and that the proposition is fair. The Court stated that there may be one issue with regard to geography since Mr. Yu's client's are in Nevada. Mr. Yu confirmed that his client's are residents of Nevada and stated that geography will not be an issue. The Court stated that it had read the file, that actions taken in the past are a concern, that there would be an expense if a third party is appointed, that it liked Mr. Cramer's suggestion of a meet and confer, and that each side should come in with a hybrid of suggestions regarding who should serve. The Court continued the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Jasmyn Tarrant and Jimmie Miller, Jr. on 5/29/20 and the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Tauna Miller and Erica Miller on 6/23/20 to September 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Matter not reported.
